head.title: ESP32 Forklift Telemetry
head.description: PCB Schematic for ESP32 Forklift (Chariot Élévateur) Telemetry System

components.name: ESP32-DevKitC
components.description: Main microcontroller - ESP32 with WiFi and BT

components.name: SIM808
components.description: GSM/GPRS + GPS module for connectivity and positioning
components.notes: Connect antenna for GPS and GSM. Insert SIM card (Ooredoo TN, APN: internet.ooredoo.tn)

components.name: ADS1115
components.description: 4-channel 16-bit I2C ADC - Address 0x48 (ADDR pin to GND)

components.name: JSN-SR04T
components.description: Waterproof ultrasonic proximity sensor - rear obstacle detection
components.notes: ECHO pin is 5V! Use voltage divider (2kΩ + 1kΩ) to bring to 3.3V before GPIO13

components.name: Resistor
components.description: Pullup resistor for oil pressure sensor on ADS1115 A0

components.name: Resistor
components.description: Pullup resistor for fuel level sensor on ADS1115 A1

components.name: Resistor
components.description: Fixed resistor in NTC voltage divider on ADS1115 A3

components.name: Resistor
components.description: Top resistor of voltage divider for JSN-SR04T ECHO (5V→3.3V)

components.name: Resistor
components.description: Bottom resistor of voltage divider for JSN-SR04T ECHO

components.name: Resistor
components.description: External pullup for RPM sensor on GPIO35 (input-only pin)

components.name: Buzzer
components.description: Geofence/alert buzzer driven by GPIO26 via transistor
components.notes: Use NPN transistor (2N2222 or BC547) to drive buzzer from GPIO26 (3.3V logic)

components.name: NPN Transistor
components.description: Transistor to drive 5V buzzer from 3.3V GPIO26

components.name: Resistor
components.description: Base resistor for buzzer transistor Q1

components.name: LED
components.description: Green LED indicator - lights when oil pressure is OK (GPIO25)

components.name: Resistor
components.description: Current limiting resistor for OIL_PRESSURE_OK_LED

components.name: Switch
components.description: Forward gear switch (Closes to GND when engaged) - GPIO32

components.name: Switch
components.description: Reverse gear switch (Closes to GND when engaged) - GPIO33

components.name: Connector
components.description: Connector for oil pressure sensor (Isuzu T30 manocontact)

components.name: Connector
components.description: Connector for fuel level sensor (resistive float)

components.name: Connector
components.description: Connector for NTC temperature sensor

components.name: Connector
components.description: Connector for RPM hall effect sensor

components.name: Capacitor
components.description: Bulk capacitor for SIM808 power supply (handles GSM burst current)

components.name: Capacitor
components.description: Bypass capacitor near ADS1115 VDD pin

nets.I2C_SDA: I2C Data - ESP32 GPIO21 ↔ ADS1115 SDA
nets.I2C_SCL: I2C Clock - ESP32 GPIO22 ↔ ADS1115 SCL
nets.OIL_PRESSURE_SIGNAL: Oil sensor → R1 divider → ADS1115 A0
nets.FUEL_LEVEL_SIGNAL: Fuel sensor → R2 divider → ADS1115 A1
nets.NTC_TEMP_SIGNAL: NTC sensor → R3 divider → ADS1115 A3
nets.RPM_SENSOR: RPM Hall sensor → R6 pullup → ESP32 GPIO35

power_requirements.input_voltage: 5V DC (USB or 12V→5V Buck Converter for vehicle)
power_requirements.recommendation: Use 12V→5V 3A DC-DC Buck Converter (LM2596 or XL4016) for vehicle installation
